zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Ann Evered於大約1529年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親James Everard22歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter24歲。她於1549年與Richard Alexander Pysing在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年6月之後在英國薩默塞特可福可納，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯達古瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Ann Evered于大约1529年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲James Everard22岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter24岁。她于1549年与Richard Alexander Pysing在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年6月之后在英国薩默塞特可福可納，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯達古瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Evered
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Everard
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Ann Evered was born about 1529, in Somerset, England, her father, James Everard, was 22 and her mother, Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, was 24. She married Richard Alexander Pysing in 1549, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after June 1588, in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, and was buried in Stogursey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Ann Evered est née environ 1529, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, James Everard, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Alexander Pysing en 1549, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après juin 1588, à Crewkerne, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Stogursey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Ann Evered um 1529 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Everard 22 und ihre Mutter Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter 24. Sie hat 1549 in England Richard Alexander Pysing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach Juni 1588 in Crewkerne, Somerset, England und wurde in Stogursey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Ann Evered è nata il circa 1529 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, James Everard, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Alexander Pysing nel 1549, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il giugno 1588, nel Crewkerne, Somerset, England, e fu sepolta a Stogursey, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Ann Everedが約1529年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父James Everardは22歳，母Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carterは24歳であった。1549年にイギリスでRichard Alexander Pysingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年6月以後にイギリスソメルセトクレウケルンで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトストグルセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Ann Evered(이)가 대략 1529년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Everard(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1549년 영국에서 Richard Alexander Pysing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 6월 이후 영국 서머세트 크레w커니에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스토구르시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Ann Evered nasceu aproximadamente 1529, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Everard, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Alexander Pysing em 1549, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após junho de 1588, em Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Stogursey, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Ann Evered родилась около 1529 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени James Everard было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Alexander Pysing в 1549 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после июнь 1588 г. в местности крюкирн, сомирсет, Англия и была похоронена в местности стогурси, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1529/30–after June 1588: e tusa o le 1529–ina ua ma'ea le Iuni 1588

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Ann Evered nació aproximadamente 1529, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, James Everard, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Lewis Carter, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard Alexander Pysing en 1549, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de junio de 1588, en Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Stogursey, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
